zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anna Louise Knight於大約1482年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓時，她的父親John Carlton Knight16歲，母親Lady Anne Spencer13歲。她於1508年8月5日與Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth在英國諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1564年10月在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年83歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anna Louise Knight于大约1482年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾哈爾維爾頓时，她的父亲John Carlton Knight16岁，母亲Lady Anne Spencer13岁。她于1508年8月5日与Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth在英国諾薩普頓史爾格亞特沃斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1564年10月在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓享年83岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

nameMeanings.name: Louise
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: feminine form of Louis , introduced to England in the 17th century. Like Louisa , it has remained perennially popular and is currently frequently used as a component of compound names such as Ella-Louise, Sophie-Louise, and Tia-Louise.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anna Louise Knight was born about 1482, in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, her father, John Carlton Knight, was 16 and her mother, Lady Anne Spencer, was 13. She married Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth on 5 August 1508, in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died in October 1564, in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anna Louise Knight est née environ 1482, à Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, son père, John Carlton Knight, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Lady Anne Spencer, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth le 5 août 1508, à Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en octobre 1564, à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anna Louise Knight um 1482 in Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Carlton Knight 16 und ihre Mutter Lady Anne Spencer 13. Sie hat am 5. August 1508 in Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb im Oktober 1564 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anna Louise Knight è nata il circa 1482 nel Charwelton, Northamptonshire, England, sua padre, John Carlton Knight, aveva 16 anni e sua madre, Lady Anne Spencer, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth il 5 agosto 1508, nel Greatworth, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel ottobre 1564, nel Northampton, Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anna Louise Knightが約1482年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアチャーウエルトンで生まれた時，父John Carlton Knightは16歳，母Lady Anne Spencerは13歳であった。1508年8月5日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグレアトウオルスでSir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1564年10月にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンで83歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anna Louise Knight(이)가 대략 1482년 영국 노르섬프토실르 처웰턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Carlton Knight(은)는 16세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Anne Spencer(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1508년 8월 5일 영국 노르섬프토실르 그리트워스에서 Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1564년 10월 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anna Louise Knight nasceu aproximadamente 1482, em Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Carlton Knight, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Lady Anne Spencer, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth em 5 de agosto de 1508, em Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em outubro de 1564, em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 83 anos, e foi sepultada em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anna Louise Knight родилась около 1482 г. в местности чарвелтон, нортамптоншир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Carlton Knight было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Anne Spencer, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth 5 августа 1508 г. в местности гритворт, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла октябрь 1564 г. в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anna Louise Knight nació aproximadamente 1482, en Charwelton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Carlton Knight, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Lady Anne Spencer, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Sir Robert Pargiter Baron of Greatworth el 5 de agosto de 1508, en Greatworth, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en octubre de 1564, en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 83 años, y fue sepultada en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
